title: Bridge Essay: Was Hawan Designed to Fight Anxiety-Scientific Evidences?
concept: Mantra — inner speech, focused attention meditation, chanting neural effects.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Mantra — inner speech, focused attention meditation, chanting neural effects.

**Was Hawan Designed to Fight Anxiety-Scientific Evidences?** - J Relig Health (2020). DOI: 10.1007/s10943-016-0345-1. PMID: 28063092. Anxiety is a psychiatric disorder with unknown neurobiology; however, neurotransmitters like gamma-amino butyric acid, norepinephrine and serotonin (5-HT) play crucial roles in mediating anxiety. Present drug modules pose dependence risk to the patient; hence, there is a great need to develop complementary therapies to fight this disorder. Aromatherapy has also been employed in ancient times for a number of mental disorders. Mahamrituanjay Mantra, Om triambkum yajamahe, sughandhim puushtivardhan
